creator: A.J.Caines@halplant.com
text:
Works for me with firefox-3.6.3, nspluginwrapper-1.3.0_4, xorg-7.4_4
(slightly behind current ports tree) on up-to-date 7.3-STABLE.

Ran "nspluginwrapper --verbose --auto --install" and restarted firefox
to test. Watched Flash videos on ted.com and youtube.com.

Errors logged so far:

*** NSPlugin Viewer  *** WARNING: unhandled variable 18 (<unknown 
variable>) in NPN_GetValue()
*** NSPlugin Viewer  *** WARNING: unhandled variable 18 (<unknown 
variable>) in NPN_GetValue()
*** NSPlugin Viewer  *** WARNING: unhandled variable 18 (<unknown 
variable>) in NPN_GetValue()
*** NSPlugin Wrapper *** WARNING: unhandled variable 18 in NPP_GetValue()
*** NSPlugin Wrapper *** WARNING: unhandled variable 18 in NPP_GetValue()
*** NSPlugin Wrapper *** WARNING: unhandled variable 18 in NPP_GetValue()
